interactions.classes: underline
btn btn-outline mt-6 mb-12 w-full max-w-80 lg:max-w-87 font-light border-neutral

baseStyles.transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
